name: potassium phosphate
description: Potassium phosphate is used as a buffering agent to regulate acidity and stabilize pH in food products.

Eur. Name: Kalii Dihydrogenophosphas | Chemical/IUPAC Name: Potassium Dihydrogenorthophosphate Details It’s a little helper ingredient that helps to set the pH of a cosmetic formulation to be just right.
